chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-364 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 3288/23 26-01-2024 Mr. Muhammad Imran Soomro, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Mohsin Ali Randhawa, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.2, who is also present. After hearing the parties, with consent and on the proposal of learned Additional P.G, impugned order is set aside, being devoid of reasons in support of findings recorded by learned 1stCivil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Pano Akil, and the case is remanded back with directions to him to hear the parties and pass a fresh order by discussing material on the basis of which he has arrived at such a conclusion and whether under the law such jurisdiction, in a case of positive report, is vested with him or not. This exercise shall be done within a period of one month. This Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is disposed of according. JUDGE Ahmad
